name: Paimbnails
description: Thumbnails, capture, visual effects, audio, emotes, profiles, and custom backgrounds for Geometry Dash.

level-search-enter.name: Quick Search Key
level-search-enter.description: Press this key in the level search to trigger a search. Configure any key you want.

realtime-search-preview.name: Realtime Search Preview
realtime-search-preview.description: Shows a preview of search results as you type in the level search.

realtime-search-debounce-ms.name: Realtime Search Delay (ms)
realtime-search-debounce-ms.description: Wait time before searching while you type. Lower values feel faster but can trigger rate limits.

dynamic-song.name: Dynamic Song
dynamic-song.description: Plays the level song at a random position when viewing a level.

dynamic-song-stream-preview.name: Stream Undownloaded Songs
dynamic-song-stream-preview.description: Streams a preview of undownloaded songs that loops until you download the full song locally.

levelcell-show-separator.name: Show Separator Line
levelcell-show-separator.description: Shows the line separating thumbnail and info.

compact-list-mode.name: Compact Mode (Lists)
compact-list-mode.description: Makes level cells shorter and more compact in list views. Fits more levels on screen at once.

transparent-list-mode.name: Transparent Lists
transparent-list-mode.description: Makes list cell backgrounds transparent for a cleaner look.

levelcell-gallery-autocycle.name: Auto-Cycle Gallery (Lists/Cells)
levelcell-gallery-autocycle.description: Automatically rotates level thumbnails in list cells when a level has 2 or more photos.

levelcell-gallery-transition.name: Gallery Transition
levelcell-gallery-transition.description: Transition style when cycling between thumbnails.

levelcell-gallery-transition-duration.name: Transition Duration
levelcell-gallery-transition-duration.description: Duration of the gallery transition in seconds.

popup-gallery-transition.name: Popup Gallery Transition
popup-gallery-transition.description: Transition style when navigating between thumbnails in the popup gallery view.

popup-gallery-transition-duration.name: Popup Transition Duration
popup-gallery-transition-duration.description: Duration of the popup gallery transition in seconds.

levelinfo-bg-transition.name: Background Transition
levelinfo-bg-transition.description: Transition style when the level info background thumbnail changes (auto-cycle or manual navigation).

levelinfo-bg-transition-duration.name: Background Transition Duration
levelinfo-bg-transition-duration.description: Duration of the background transition in seconds.

levelcell-effect-on-gradient.name: Apply Effect to Background
levelcell-effect-on-gradient.description: Apply color effect to background gradient.

levelinfo-title.name: Level Info Screen
levelinfo-title.description: Settings for the level info screen

levelinfo-background-style.name: Background Style
levelinfo-background-style.description: Primary visual style of the background.

levelinfo-extra-styles.name: Extra Effects
levelinfo-extra-styles.description: Additional effects (comma-separated, max 4). Applied on top of the primary style via multi-pass.

levelinfo-bg-darkness.name: Background Darkness
levelinfo-bg-darkness.description: Darkness overlay on the thumbnail background. 0 = clear, 50 = full black.

profile-music-title.name: Profile Music
profile-music-title.description: Music that plays when viewing profiles

profile-music-enabled.name: Enable Profile Music
profile-music-enabled.description: Play custom music when viewing profiles.

profile-music-crossfade.name: Crossfade Transition
profile-music-crossfade.description: Smooth fade between background music and profile music instead of cutting abruptly.

profile-music-fade-duration.name: Fade Duration (seconds)
profile-music-fade-duration.description: Duration of the crossfade transition in seconds.

main-menu-layout-keybind.name: Main Menu Layout Editor
main-menu-layout-keybind.description: Open or save the main menu button layout editor.

main-menu-layout-grid-snap.name: Main Menu Grid Snap
main-menu-layout-grid-snap.description: Snap main menu buttons to the editor grid while dragging.

main-menu-layout-grid-size.name: Main Menu Grid Size
main-menu-layout-grid-size.description: Grid size used by the main menu layout editor.

main-menu-layout-snap-distance.name: Main Menu Snap Distance
main-menu-layout-snap-distance.description: Snap distance in pixels for the main menu layout editor.

main-menu-layout-show-guides.name: Main Menu Layout Guides
main-menu-layout-show-guides.description: Show alignment guides while editing the main menu layout.

main-menu-layout-snap-to-edges.name: Main Menu Edge Snap
main-menu-layout-snap-to-edges.description: Snap main menu buttons to screen edges and matching button edges.

main-menu-layout-reset.name: Reset Main Menu Layout
main-menu-layout-reset.description: Delete the saved custom layout and restore the base menu button positions.

profile-img-zlayer.name: Profile Image Z-Layer
profile-img-zlayer.description: Z-order of the profile image behind the popup. Lower = further back. Adjust until the image shows correctly behind panels.

dynamic-popup-title.name: Dynamic Popup
dynamic-popup-title.description: Custom entry & exit animations for all Paimbnails popups

dynamic-popup-enabled.name: Enable Dynamic Popup
dynamic-popup-enabled.description: Replace the default elastic animation with a smooth, physics-inspired one on every Paimbnails popup.

dynamic-popup-style.name: Animation Style
dynamic-popup-style.description: PaimonUI = expands from button. Slide Up/Down = directional. Zoom Fade = quick scale. Elastic = bouncy overshoot. Bounce = drop-bounce. Flip/Fold = 3D-ish axis reveal. Pop Rotate = scale + spin.

dynamic-popup-speed.name: Animation Speed
dynamic-popup-speed.description: Multiplier for animation duration. Higher = faster.

enable-for-you.name: Enable For You
enable-for-you.description: Enable 'Para Ti' recommendations. When disabled, the tab shows 'Próximamente'.

for-you-min-levels.name: Minimum Levels
for-you-min-levels.description: Minimum number of levels played before recommendations activate.

for-you-use-tags.name: Use Level Tags
for-you-use-tags.description: Use Level Tags mod data to improve recommendations (requires kampwski.level_tags).

enable-thumbnail-taking.name: Enable Capture Button
enable-thumbnail-taking.description: Show capture button in pause menu.

settings-panel-keybind.name: Open Settings Panel
settings-panel-keybind.description: Press this key to open or close the Paimon settings panel.

capture-keybind.name: Capture Thumbnail
capture-keybind.description: Press this key during gameplay to capture a thumbnail

performance-title.name: Performance & Optimization
performance-title.description: Settings for improving performance and resource usage

gif-ram-cache.name: Cache GIFs in RAM
gif-ram-cache.description: Keep processed GIFs in RAM for faster loading. Warning: High RAM usage.

disable-video-chunks.name: Disable Video Chunking
disable-video-chunks.description: Bypass segmented chunk loading and load the entire video file into memory at once. Reduces playback latency at the cost of higher initial memory usage.

maintenance-cleanup.name: Run Mod Cleanup
maintenance-cleanup.description: Clean temporary/cache files and run a health check.

maintenance-refresh-mod-code.name: Fetch Mod Code
maintenance-refresh-mod-code.description: Verify mod/admin status and fetch a fresh moderator code.

maintenance-copy-mod-code.name: Copy Mod Code
maintenance-copy-mod-code.description: Copy your current moderator code to the clipboard.

enable-disk-cache.name: Enable Disk Cache
enable-disk-cache.description: Save downloaded thumbnails to disk so they persist between navigations. Avoids re-downloading thumbnails every time.

clear-cache-on-exit.name: Clear Cache on Exit
clear-cache-on-exit.description: Delete downloaded thumbnails when the game closes. Next session will re-download them. Keeps storage clean for other users.

enable-debug-logs.name: Enable Debug Logs
enable-debug-logs.description: Show all mod logs. When disabled, no logs are emitted.

custom-cursor-title.name: Custom Cursor
custom-cursor-title.description: Replace the OS cursor with a custom image inside Geometry Dash.

custom-cursor-enable.name: Enable Custom Cursor
custom-cursor-enable.description: Replaces the OS cursor with a custom image. Add images via the Paimon Settings panel (Pet & More > Custom Cursor).

custom-cursor-scale.name: Cursor Scale
custom-cursor-scale.description: Size of the custom cursor sprite.

custom-cursor-trail.name: Enable Cursor Trail
custom-cursor-trail.description: Shows a glowing motion trail behind the custom cursor.

custom-cursor-hide-in-gameplay.name: Hide Cursor During Gameplay
custom-cursor-hide-in-gameplay.description: Hides the custom cursor while playing a level, respecting the game's native 'Show Cursor' setting.
